title: Colorful Azaleas [MC 1.21.1+]
description: Adds really cool azalea trees in all Minecraft colors
body:
# Colorful Azaleas

*Do you want to bring more color to your forest?*  
*Have you ever thought to yourself, why do these leaves not droop?*  
*Are you ready to fully embrace rainbow leaves?*  
*Look no further!*  

Colorful Azaleas adds azalea trees colored in all the 16 Minecraft colors, each including a full wood set, pottable saplings and leaves in all the shapes and forms you could ever desire. Be it droopy, mixed or flowery leaves, we got you covered!

The wood sets feature:
- Logs (including Stripped Logs)
- Wood (Including Stripped Wood)
- Planks
- Stairs
- Slabs
- Fences
- Fence Gates
- Doors (in part with unique textures!)
- Trapdoors (in part with unique textures!)
- Pressure Plates
- Buttons
- Signs / Hanging Signs
- Shelves
- Boats
- Chest Boats

### ''But how could I possibly obtain all these beautiful blocks?''

Colored Azalea Saplings drop when breaking vanilla Azalea Leaves.

### Original Mod

You can find the original mod at [Colorful Azaleas by Kekei6](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-azaleas), updated with permission.
